title.en: Automated Temporary and Emergency Account Management

prose.en: Automatically {param:ac-02.02_odp.01} temporary and emergency accounts after {param:ac-02.02_odp.02}.

guidance.en: Management of temporary and emergency accounts includes the removal or disabling of such accounts automatically after a predefined time period rather than at the convenience of the system administrator. Automatic removal or disabling of accounts provides a more consistent implementation.

prose.en: temporary and emergency accounts are automatically {param:ac-02.02_odp.01} after {param:ac-02.02_odp.02}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
system-generated list of temporary accounts removed and/or disabled
system-generated list of emergency accounts removed and/or disabled
Organizational personnel with account management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security with information security responsibilities
Automated mechanisms for implementing account management functions

guidelines.en: the time period after which to automatically remove or disable temporary or emergency accounts is defined;

ac-02.02_odp.02.alt-label: time period for each type of account
